name: Axis Animation
short_description: Glasgow animation studio behind cinematic trailers for Halo, Alien: Isolation, and many more — BAFTA and Emmy-winning, closed 2024.
about: Based in Glasgow, Axis Animation spent over two decades as one of Scotland's most decorated animation studios. Bringing together producers, directors, designers, artists, and animators, the studio became a trusted partner to major games publishers, crafting high-end trailers and cinematic short films for franchises including Halo, Fable Legends, Need for Speed Rivals, and Alien: Isolation. Their work earned widespread industry recognition, including a Best Animation BAFTA and the Imagina Grand Jury Prize. Founded in 2000, Axis closed in July 2024 with the loss of around 160 jobs.

news.title: Emmy-winning animation studio collapses with 160 job losses
Axis Studios Closes: The Hidden VFX Ally Behind Stop Motion's Digital Edge
